title: Create new board field options - Zapier and Integromat
excerpt: I am trying to setup a Zapier zap that creates a new board based on a template when a new object is created in Salesforce. It looks like it worked, however there is no option to specify the workspace ID in the Zapier fie…

posts.author: rosovconsulting (Rosov Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to setup a Zapier zap that creates a new board based on a template when a new object is created in Salesforce. It looks like it worked, however there is no option to specify the workspace ID in the Zapier fields. Why is that?

I then tried to use Integromat, but found that it didn’t even have the template ID field, so that wasn’t helpful either.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rosovconsulting

It looks like this has to do with timing. At the time Zapier end Integromat “zaps” were build there was no option to specify a Workspace ID in the API. That was made available an a later date. The disadvantage of Zapier and Integromat is that they are always lagging behind with regards to new possibilities in the API.

posts.author: rosovconsulting (Rosov Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah makes sense! Hope they can get updated soon.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rosovconsulting

As confirmed by the awesome @basdebruin , this is just not part of Zapier or Integromat just yet, although zI definitely understand how this would be helpful to implement. I’ve taken this as feedback to our apps team

That said, perhaps it might make sense to run an HTTP module on Integromat, for example, using a simple APi call to create the board for you? You could then specify the Workspace ID as part of the query, although I realise this is a bit more convoluted than using the no-code solution.

Transparently, I am not able to confirm an ETA or even a rough timeline at this point, but I do hope this will be added in the future.

-Alex

posts.author: rosovconsulting (Rosov Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks - good idea. I think it’s okay for now, but will consider using an HTTP module if I need in the meantime.

posts.author: rosovconsulting (Rosov Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: @AlexSavchuk I just tried out the new Zapier integration, but was surprised to learn that this feature was not included yet. Is it on the roadmap to include this feature? It makes no sense that you can’t determine which workspace to put a new board in, when it’s very simple to do that from within monday.com.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rosovconsulting

Thank you for your feedback here! In the new version of the Zapier integration, we focused on things that would have the most impact for our user’s experience after analyzing the feedback we’d received. The top priority items were:

  • Column values formatting
  • Being able to search your boards in Zapier
  • Making the interface more straightforward (removing the need to input column ID), and returning more data per trigger.

Perhaps this is something we will be able to implement in future iterations. I hope this sheds more light on the improvements.

-Alex
